rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:20 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100]>那边的3个稻草人模拟了
成群的吉波得来袭的情况。
想要<Color=red>一举击倒<Color=white>它们，就要瞄准它们中间……<unk[5:0]>
那块<Color=red>突出<Color=white>的岩石似乎是个不错的目标。
或者也可以<Color=red>迅速地<Color=white>逐一攻破……

无论做何选择，<unk[5:0]>雷击目标<Color=red>距离越远<Color=white>，
就需要<Color=red>越长时间<Color=white>蓄力……<unk[5:0]>别忘了这点。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:20 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100]>那3個稻草人
模擬了吉波得成群結隊來襲的情況。
如果想<Color=red>一網打盡<Color=white>，就要瞄準3個目標的中央……<unk[5:0]>
那個突出的<Color=red>岩石附近<Color=white>感覺就不錯。
不然就是要<Color=red>迅速地<Color=white>個別擊破……

無論如何，<unk[5:0]>只要落雷的<Color=red>距離越遠<Color=white>，
累積能量所需的<Color=red>時間就會越長<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>可別忘了這點。

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:20 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100]>I'm picturing these three target dummies
as a swarm of Gibdos.

If we want to hit all three of them with one
strike, you should aim for the space
between them—like where that rock is!
I could also quickly hit each one
individually. That would work too.

Regardless, the farther my target is from
me, the longer it takes to build up the
energy to strike them. <unk[5:0]>Keep that in mind.
